title: • Monetization Strategy: The strategy revolves around generating revenu
content:
• Monetization Strategy: The strategy revolves around generating revenue through creator fees on the token, capitalizing on its limited supply and association with the official stream.
  • Streaming Market Potential: Highlighting the lucrative market of live streaming and its potential for generating revenue.
  • Example of Successful Streaming: Using “Palm Fun live” and “Wolf” as examples to illustrate how even simple content can attract a large audience and generate significant market value.
  • Proposed Streaming Idea: Suggesting a simple streaming idea of “Grock versus ChatGBT” to capitalize on the market and generate creator fees.
  • Interactive Betting Feature: Implementing a feature allowing users to place bets on the actions or outcomes within the show, such as predicting Croc’s stance in an argument.
  • Influencing Show Elements: Introducing a mechanism where user actions or token price thresholds can trigger specific events or changes within the show, like influencing Rock or ChatGPT.
  • Incentive-Based Actions: Tying specific actions or rewards to the token price reaching certain milestones, such as giving away a percentage of creative fees at 1,500,000 tokens.
